title: Grayscale Files for First US Worldcoin ETF
summary: Grayscale Investments has filed an S-1 registration with the SEC to launch the first Worldcoin ETF in the US, expanding its lineup beyond Bitcoin and Ethereum products.
body:
Grayscale Investments, a leading digital asset manager, has filed an S-1 registration with the US Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) for a Worldcoin exchange-traded fund (ETF). This filing marks the first attempt to bring a Worldcoin-focused ETF to the US market, diversifying Grayscale's portfolio beyond its existing Bitcoin and Ethereum products.

The S-1 filing is a crucial regulatory step that, if approved, would allow Grayscale to offer shares of the Worldcoin ETF to the public. The filing details the structure and strategy of the ETF, emphasizing its potential to provide investors with exposure to the Worldcoin ecosystem.

For everyday investors, this development could mean easier access to Worldcoin without directly purchasing the cryptocurrency. ETFs are typically seen as more accessible and less volatile than direct crypto investments, making them an attractive option for those new to the space. This could also drive more mainstream attention to Worldcoin and its unique use cases.

Investors should watch for the SEC's response to Grayscale's S-1 filing, as approval would pave the way for the ETF's launch. The timeline for approval is uncertain, but a positive decision could open the door for more innovative crypto ETFs in the future. Potential investors should stay informed about regulatory updates and consider the risks and benefits of adding a Worldcoin ETF to their portfolios.
twitterThread: Grayscale just filed an S-1 for the first US Worldcoin ETF. If approved, it would give investors exposure to Worldcoin without buying the crypto directly.
The filing expands Grayscale's lineup beyond Bitcoin and Ethereum products. Approval would be a major step for Worldcoin in the US market.
Keep an eye on the SEC's response. Approval could open the door for more crypto ETFs. Read more → https://www.cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-07-21-grayscale-files-for-first-us-worldcoin-etf
standaloneTweet: Grayscale has filed an S-1 with the SEC for the first US Worldcoin ETF. This could make investing in Worldcoin simpler and more accessible for everyday investors.
